meaning: n.[矿]凝灰岩adj.<美俚> 第一流的
examples: Welded tuff is commonly rhyolitic in composition.
The Lubaka tuff does not contain minerals that can be dated radiometrically.
The sedimentary rocks are graywacke, siltstone, tuff andpellitie, etc.
You will quickly discover what the locals have known for centuries: the tuff rock keeps rooms cool in summer and warm in winter.
